scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/omninity-website run build && node build.mjs && electron-builder --publish never && pnpm -w rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.package:linux: pnpm --filter @workspace/omninity-website run build && node build.mjs && electron-builder --linux --publish never && pnpm -w rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @workspace/omninity-website run build && node build.mjs && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never && pnpm -w rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.package:win: pnpm --filter @workspace/omninity-website run build && node build.mjs && electron-builder --win --publish never && pnpm -w rebuild better-sqlite3
